lore.english:
Taimanin, graduate of Gosha Academy. She has been active as an official Taimanin after graduation. She was trusted among class-mates as a student council member, but she was criticized by instructors that she is lazy when it comes to finishing her job. Nowadays, she's making up for her past mistakes by accumulating more and more accomplishments.

Diligent, enjoys drinking tea, reading and sunbathing. Her favorite foods are Sukiyaki and Natto.

As a Wind Art ninja, she has outstanding power and ability in analyzing. Her other name, the "Storm Fan," comes from her combat style that blows away and tears enemies apart with her main weapon ─ a large fan.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Wind Art: Cyclone[-]
skills.description:
Swings a fan to send a gust of wind at the enemy.
Reduces the duration of the target’s [&HealTurn] by [V2:370102] turn(s).
skills.description_readable:
Swings a fan to send a gust of wind at the enemy.
Reduces the duration of the target’s [&HealTurn] by [V2:370102] turn(s).

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Wind Art: Blazing Wind[-]
skills.description:
Swings a fan continuously to send 5 gusts of wind that attacks [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Targets hit are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:370203]%)[-] [&HealRateDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:370203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:370203] turn(s)
If the target is already inflicted with [&HealRateDown], every attack inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:370202]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a fixed chance of [&Color_Cyan][R:370202]%[-].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:370202] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Swings a fan continuously to send 5 gusts of wind that attacks [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Targets hit are inflicted with ([V3:370203]%) [&HealRateDown] at a [R:370203]% chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:370203] turn(s)
If the target is already inflicted with [&HealRateDown], every attack inflicts ([V3:370202]%) [&Bleeding] at a fixed chance of [R:370202]%.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:370202] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Wind Art: Rampaging Gust[-]
skills.description:
Makes a large tornado and sends it toward [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Performs a [&Common_Word_Skill_ShieldPenetrate] attack.
When defeating an enemy with this skill, fills [&Color_Cyan]([V3:370304]%)[-] of the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:370304]%[-] chance for [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].
Steals the [&SpdUp] [&Buff] of [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
skills.description_readable:
Makes a large tornado and sends it toward [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].

Steals the [&SpdUp] [&Buff] of [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Fan of the Storm[-]
skills.description: If the character has [&SpdUp], increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:370401]%[-] of their SPD.
skills.description_readable: If the character has [&SpdUp], increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] by [V3:370401]% of their SPD.
